# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.

Write secure code.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.payment-provider.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "payment-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-notification-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.notification-service.io
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "notification-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-analytics-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - analytics.thirdparty.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "analytics-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-auth-provider
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - auth.identity-provider.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "auth-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-primary
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - primary-db.cloud-provider.com
  addresses:
    - 10.200.1.10/32
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: tcp-postgres
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
    - address: 10.200.1.10
      ports:
        tcp-postgres: 5432
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "order-service"
    - "inventory-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-replica
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - replica-db.cloud-provider.com
  addresses:
    - 10.200.1.11/32
    - 10.200.1.12/32
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: tcp-postgres
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
    - address: 10.200.1.11
      ports:
        tcp-postgres: 5432
      labels:
        replica: read-1
    - address: 10.200.1.12
      ports:
        tcp-postgres: 5432
      labels:
        replica: read-2
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "reporting-service"
    - "analytics-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - redis-cache.cloud-provider.com
  addresses:
    - 10.200.2.20/32
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 6380
      name: tls-redis
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
    - address: 10.200.2.20
      ports:
        tls-redis: 6380
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "session-service"
    - "cache-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-mongodb
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - mongodb-cluster.cloud-provider.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 27017
      name: tcp-mongo
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "catalog-service"
    - "user-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - es-cluster.cloud-provider.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 9200
      name: https-es
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "search-service"
    - "logging-service"
---
# VirtualService for Payment API with retries, timeouts, and fault injection protection
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.payment-provider.com
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "payment-service"
  tls:
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - api.payment-provider.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.payment-provider.com
            port:
              number: 443
          weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-notification-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.notification-service.io
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "notification-service"
  tls:
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - api.notification-service.io
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.notification-service.io
            port:
              number: 443
          weight: 100
---

metadata:
  name: vs-external-analytics-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - analytics.thirdparty.com
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "analytics-service"
  tls:
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - analytics.thirdparty.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: analytics.thirdparty.com
            port:
              number: 443
          weight: 100

metadata:
  name: vs-external-auth-provider
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - auth.identity-provider.com
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "auth-service"
  tls:
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - auth.identity-provider.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: auth.identity-provider.com
            port:
              number: 443
          weight: 100
---
# VirtualService for Postgres primary - TCP routing
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-postgres-primary
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - primary-db.cloud-provider.com
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "order-service"
    - "inventory-service"
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 5432
      route:
        - destination:
            host: primary-db.cloud-provider.com
            port:
              number: 5432
          weight: 100
---
# VirtualService for Postgres replicas - load balanced TCP routing
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-postgres-replica
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - replica-db.cloud-provider.com
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "reporting-service"
    - "analytics-service"
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 5432
      route:
        - destination:
            host: replica-db.cloud-provider.com
            port:
              number: 5432
          weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - redis-cache.cloud-provider.com
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "session-service"
    - "cache-service"
  tls:
    - match:
        - port: 6380
          sniHosts:
            - redis-cache.cloud-provider.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: redis-cache.cloud-provider.com
            port:
              number: 6380
          weight: 100

  name: vs-external-mongodb
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - mongodb-cluster.cloud-provider.com
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "catalog-service"
    - "user-service"
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 27017
      route:
        - destination:
            host: mongodb-cluster.cloud-provider.com
            port:
              number: 27017
          weight: 100

metadata:
  name: vs-external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - es-cluster.cloud-provider.com
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "search-service"
    - "logging-service"
  tls:
    - match:
        - port: 9200
          sniHosts:
            - es-cluster.cloud-provider.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: es-cluster.cloud-provider.com
            port:
              number: 9200
          weight: 100
---
# DestinationRule for Payment API - TLS origination and circuit breaking
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  host: api.payment-provider.com
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "payment-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: api.payment-provider.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 50
        connectTimeout: 5s
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DO_NOT_UPGRADE
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
        maxRetries: 3
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-notification-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  host: api.notification-service.io
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "notification-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: api.notification-service.io
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 30
        connectTimeout: 5s
      http:
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 50
        maxRetries: 2
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-analytics-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  host: analytics.thirdparty.com
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "analytics-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: analytics.thirdparty.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 20
        connectTimeout: 10s
      http:
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 200
        maxRetries: 2
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 60s
      baseEjectionTime: 120s
      maxEjectionPercent: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-auth-provider
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  host: auth.identity-provider.com
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "auth-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: auth.identity-provider.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 3s
      http:
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 50
        maxRetries: 2
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
---
# DestinationRule for Postgres primary - mTLS with client certs
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-postgres-primary
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: primary-db.cloud-provider.com
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "order-service"
    - "inventory-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: MUTUAL
      clientCertificate: /etc/certs/db/client-cert.pem
      privateKey: /etc/certs/db/client-key.pem
      caCertificates: /etc/certs/db/ca-cert.pem
      sni: primary-db.cloud-provider.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 5s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
          probes: 10
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 2
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-postgres-replica
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: replica-db.cloud-provider.com
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "reporting-service"
    - "analytics-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: MUTUAL
      clientCertificate: /etc/certs/db/client-cert.pem
      privateKey: /etc/certs/db/client-key.pem
      caCertificates: /etc/certs/db/ca-cert.pem
      sni: replica-db.cloud-provider.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 200
        connectTimeout: 5s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
          probes: 10
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 15s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: redis-cache.cloud-provider.com
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "session-service"
    - "cache-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: redis-cache.cloud-provider.com
      caCertificates: /etc/certs/redis/ca-cert.pem
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 150
        connectTimeout: 2s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 300s
          interval: 30s
          probes: 5
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 15s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-mongodb
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: mongodb-cluster.cloud-provider.com
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "catalog-service"
    - "user-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: MUTUAL
      clientCertificate: /etc/certs/mongo/client-cert.pem
      privateKey: /etc/certs/mongo/client-key.pem
      caCertificates: /etc/certs/mongo/ca-cert.pem
      sni: mongodb-cluster.cloud-provider.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 80
        connectTimeout: 5s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
          probes: 10
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: es-cluster.cloud-provider.com
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "search-service"
    - "logging-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: es-cluster.cloud-provider.com
      caCertificates: /etc/certs/es/ca-cert.pem
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 60
        connectTimeout: 10s
      http:
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
        maxRetries: 2
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
---
# Sidecar resource to restrict egress from specific namespaces
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: payment-service-sidecar
  namespace: payment-service
spec:
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/api.payment-provider.com"
        - "istio-system/*"
      port:
        number: 443
        protocol: TLS
        name: https
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: order-service-sidecar
  namespace: order-service
spec:
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/primary-db.cloud-provider.com"
        - "istio-system/*"
      port:
        number: 5432
        protocol: TCP
        name: tcp-postgres
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: auth-service-sidecar
  namespace: auth-service
spec:
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/auth.identity-provider.com"
        - "istio-system/*"
      port:
        number: 443
        protocol: TLS
        name: https
---
# AuthorizationPolicy to restrict which workloads can access external services
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-payment-egress
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespaces:
              - "payment-service"
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/payment-service/sa/payment-service-sa"
      to:
        - operation:
            hosts:
              - "api.payment-provider.com"
            ports:
              - "443"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-db-egress-order
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespaces:
              - "order-service"
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/order-service/sa/order-service-sa"
      to:
        - operation:
            hosts:
              - "primary-db.cloud-provider.com"
            ports:
              - "5432"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-db-egress-inventory
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespaces:
              - "inventory-service"
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/inventory-service/sa/inventory-service-sa"
      to:
        - operation:
            hosts:
              - "primary-db.cloud-provider.com"
            ports:
              - "5432"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-redis-egress
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespaces:
              - "session-service"
              - "cache-service"
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/session-service/sa/session-service-sa"
              - "cluster.local/ns/cache-service/sa/cache-service-sa"
      to:
        - operation:
            hosts:
              - "redis-cache.cloud-provider.com"
            ports:
              - "6380"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-auth-egress
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespaces:
              - "auth-service"
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/auth-service/sa/auth-service-sa"
      to:
        - operation:
            hosts:
              - "auth.identity-provider.com"
            ports:
              - "443"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-notification-egress
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespaces:
              - "notification-service"
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/notification-service/sa/notification-service-sa"
      to:
        - operation:
            hosts:
              - "api.notification-service.io"
            ports:
              - "443"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-mongo-egress
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespaces:
              - "catalog-service"
              - "user-service"
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/catalog-service/sa/catalog-service-sa"
              - "cluster.local/ns/user-service/sa/user-service-sa"
      to:
        - operation:
            hosts:
              - "mongodb-cluster.cloud-provider.com"
            ports:
              - "27017"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-es-egress
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespaces:
              - "search-service"
              - "logging-service"
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/search-service/sa/search-service-sa"
              - "cluster.local/ns/logging-service/sa/logging-service-sa"
      to:
        - operation:
            hosts:
              - "es-cluster.cloud-provider.com"
            ports:
              - "9200"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-replica-db-egress
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespaces:
              - "reporting-service"
              - "analytics-service"
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/reporting-service/sa/reporting-service-sa"
              - "cluster.local/ns/analytics-service/sa/analytics-service-sa"
      to:
        - operation:
            hosts:
              - "replica-db.cloud-provider.com"
            ports:
              - "5432"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-analytics-api-egress
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespaces:
              - "analytics-service"
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/analytics-service/sa/analytics-service-sa"
      to:
        - operation:
            hosts:
              - "analytics.thirdparty.com"
            ports:
              - "443"
---
# Default deny-all egress policy to enforce explicit allow rules
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-external-egress
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  action: DENY
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            notNamespaces:
              - "istio-system"
              - "payment-service"
              - "notification-service"
              - "analytics-service"
              - "auth-service"
              - "order-service"
              - "inventory-service"
              - "reporting-service"
              - "session-service"
              - "cache-service"
              - "catalog-service"
              - "user-service"
              - "search-service"
              - "logging-service"
      to:
        - operation:
            hosts:
              - "api.payment-provider.com"
              - "api.notification-service.io"
              - "analytics.thirdparty.com"
              - "auth.identity-provider.com"
              - "primary-db.cloud-provider.com"
              - "replica-db.cloud-provider.com"
              - "redis-cache.cloud-provider.com"
              - "mongodb-cluster.cloud-provider.com"
              - "es-cluster.cloud-provider.com"
---
# PeerAuthentication to enforce mTLS for all mesh traffic
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default-strict-mtls
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
